task:
Create three separate RenderDoc capture-settings files for three different target programs, then register all three in the qrenderdoc UI configuration's recent list in the specified order.

All three files must be valid JSON with a top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker and a nested "settings" object. Do not add any other top-level keys.

1. /home/user/captures/vk_game.cap — Vulkan game:
   - settings.executable = "/usr/local/games/vk_game"
   - settings.workingDir = "/home/user/games/vk_game"
   - settings.commandLine = "--renderer vulkan"
   - settings.options = {"APIValidation": true, "CaptureCallstacks": false, "HookIntoChildren": false}
   - settings.autoStart = false

2. /home/user/captures/gl_demo.cap — OpenGL demo:
   - settings.executable = "/usr/local/games/gl_demo"
   - settings.workingDir = "/home/user/games/gl_demo"
   - settings.commandLine = "--opengl"
   - settings.options = {"APIValidation": false, "CaptureCallstacks": false, "HookIntoChildren": true}
   - settings.autoStart = false

3. /home/user/captures/tool_sim.cap — tool simulation:
   - settings.executable = "/usr/local/bin/tool_sim"
   - settings.workingDir = "/home/user"
   - settings.commandLine = "--batch"
   - settings.options = {"APIValidation": true, "CaptureCallstacks": true, "HookIntoChildren": false}
   - settings.autoStart = true

Then edit /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document) so the key "RecentCaptureSettings" is a JSON array of exactly these three absolute paths, in this exact order: first /home/user/captures/vk_game.cap, then /home/user/captures/gl_demo.cap, then /home/user/captures/tool_sim.cap. The top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker must still be present after saving. Do not remove or rename any other key.

verification.description: RecentCaptureSettings is the ordered list of three preset paths
